headline: Intuitive Surgical Trades Near 2-Year Low: Is $600 Within Reach?

headline: J&J launches improved Shockwave catheter
summary: The latest generation of the coronary intravascular lithotripsy device is designed to be more flexible to help physicians navigate tight arteries to break up calcified deposits and restore blood flow.

raw.headline: J&J launches improved Shockwave catheter
raw.summary: The latest generation of the coronary intravascular lithotripsy device is designed to be more flexible to help physicians navigate tight arteries to break up calcified deposits and restore blood flow.

headline: Stryker and Max Smart Hospital, Saket Partner to Advance Surgeon Training and Education in Robotic-Arm Assisted Joint Replacement
summary: Stryker, a global leader in medical technologies, and Max Smart Super Speciality Hospital, Saket, a leading healthcare provider in Delhi NCR, announced a strategic collaboration to advance surgeon training, clinical education, and patient care in robotic-arm assisted joint replacement in India.
